x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CIs with Unknown operational status are treated ambiguously by Now Assist during impact analysis. High Unknown rates cause AI to include potentially decommissioned or test CIs in impact scope.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review CIs with Unknown operational status via cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=install_status=1^operational_status=Unknown. Cross-reference against discovery data. Target: ≤5% of active CIs with Unknown status. Unknown status causes Now Assist to ambiguously scope impact analysis.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_3af81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c18
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[CIs with Unknown operational status are treated ambiguously by Now Assist during impact analysis. High Unknown rates cause AI to include potentially decommissioned or test CIs in impact scope.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Operational Status Accuracy</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaUnknown = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaUnknown.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaUnknown.addNullQuery('operational_status');
    gaUnknown.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaUnknown.query();
    var unknown = gaUnknown.next() ? parseInt(gaUnknown.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. Operational status accuracy cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((unknown / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs have Unknown operational status (' + unknown + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct <= 5) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs have Unknown operational status. Now Assist impact analysis will accurately scope to operational assets.' };
    } else if (pct <= 30) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have Unknown operational status (target: ≤5%). Now Assist may ambiguously scope impact analysis and include potentially decommissioned assets.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have Unknown operational status. Widespread operational status gaps mean Now Assist impact analysis is unreliable — it cannot distinguish operational from decommissioned assets.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000377</number><order>50</order><remediation_guidance>Review CIs with Unknown operational status via cmdb_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=install_status=1^operational_status=Unknown. Cross-reference against discovery data. Target: ≤5% of active CIs with Unknown status. Unknown status causes Now Assist to ambiguously scope impact analysis.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>3af81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c18</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Operational Status Accuracy</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_3af81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c18</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
